$schema_comment: Single source of truth for runtime/SDK version pins. Consistency tests in tests/test_runtime_versions.py enforce alignment across package manifests, Dockerfiles, CI, and docs.

node.notes: Major pin only in images/CI (no invented patch/digest). engines lower bound matches @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent 0.80.3 engines (>=22.19.0).

python.notes: Minor pin only (no invented patch/digest). Sandbox service image and CI install 3.11.

pi_sdk.notes: Exact pins only (no ^/~). BFF (api-server) must not depend on the SDK. Frontend does not pin the coding-agent SDK.

sandbox_tooling_node.notes: Node installed inside the sandbox image for agent-executed Node tooling (not the Agent/BFF service runtime). Aligned to the same major as service Node.

frontend_dev_types.notes: frontend must declare @types/node as a direct devDependency (exact). Do not rely on transitive types from pi-web-ui or other packages; vite.config.ts imports node:url.
